cards.title: Creativity Flourishes When You Become a Parent
cards.body: A father discovers that having children sparks unexpected creative inspiration rather than stifling it. His son's imaginative observations—like calling kale stalks 'giraffes going to Bunnings'—reveal how parenting transforms perspective and unlocks artistic potential.

cards.title: Parents' Brains Stay Younger and Sharper
cards.body: Recent studies show mothers and fathers have healthier, younger-looking brains than non-parents. Years of mental and emotional demands from parenting appear to keep minds more agile and resilient.

cards.title: Mindfulness Helps Families Through Gender Transition
cards.body: Parents navigating their child's gender transition can benefit from mindfulness and compassion practices. These tools help families adapt when reality differs from expectations.
